anti_patterns.title: Multi-destination navigation turns conversion into browsing
anti_patterns.do_not: Offer a broad navigation menu when the page has one focused offer and one intended decision.

anti_patterns.title: Several CTA labels compete for one offer
anti_patterns.do_not: Give the same conversion action multiple competing labels that make the next step ambiguous.

anti_patterns.title: Benefit claim arrives without proof
anti_patterns.do_not: Lead with outcome claims without a concrete demonstration, credible result, or mechanism.
